Christian Murdock

Community honors Deputy Andrew Peery outside the El Paso County Sheriff's Office Friday, Aug. 12, 2022, with a flag-raising ceremony. The flag will drape Peery's coffin during his funeral service on Monday. Peery was killed Sunday while responding to a shooting in the Security-Widefield area.
